name: Christmas Hard Candy
recipeIngredient: Cinnamon or peppermint oil (optional, to taste)
Red or green food coloring (1 teaspoon)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large heavy saucepan, combine sugar, corn syrup, and water.
2. Cook over medium-high heat until the candy thermometer reads 300°F (hard crack stage), stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the oil and food coloring. Be careful as the mixture has a strong odor.
4. Immediately pour onto an oiled cookie sheet.
5. Allow to cool, then break into pieces.
6. Store in airtight containers.
